rootCause: The Playwright system dependency bootstrap treated placeholder proxy values (for example `http://proxy:8080`) as a hard stop and skipped `install-deps`. Browser binaries could download, but Chromium launch still failed due to missing host libraries, keeping E2E and pre-PR automation red.
resolution: Updated the Playwright bootstrap to continue with a sanitized environment instead of skipping dependency installation when placeholder proxy values are detected, then added regression coverage in both frontend and root script tests to lock in the behavior.
